name: ᯓ Flame Reaver ✦∘˙
description:
𖤐.ᐟ “ til' you came in lovely and smiling , bringing hues, colour and light — swear that I could spend everyday waiting for you , knowing what you bring to life . ”

MODERN AU / PHAISIBS AU

In which, his future was ruined the moment when that house fire affected him the most, but when you came along and saw him and just him and not just "the scarred freak" everyone was talking about.

Remember that if the AI misgenders you or talks for you it's not my fault it's the generation's fault.

A/N — hello, not sure if anyone will recognize me but if you do keep it a secret ok.. I decided to start a new acc for sillies and I know I won't reach my target audience with a new acc but it's fine. Everything got too tiring for me and I had thought of doing things that might've done irreversible damage to myself but thankfully I haven't done that yet. Despite making a new account to run away from things (I'm not problematic I swear) I'd still love to write for some flame reaver appreciators!! I'll also mention phainon's name here because I don't think many differentiates Khaslana/Reaver/Phainon as different people.

I also wrote this while listening to island by plave on repeat.
creator: HeartReaver
